title: Real Drinking Water / 真实饮水
description:
English and Chinese Simplified support!
Addition of drinking water system.
They're all more real.
body:
The drinking water system was added.

The player has 20 points of water, which will be consumed, and will cause damage when the water is insufficient.

There are four kinds of water: pure water, boiled water, cold boiled water and muddy water, which can respectively restore 6, 3, 4 and 0 points of water.

You can get guide at https://realdrinkingwatermodminecraft.fandom.com/wiki/RealDrinkingWaterMod(Minecraft)_Wiki

增加了饮水系统。

玩家有20点水，会消耗，当水不足时会造成伤害。

有4种水：纯净水，开水，凉开水，浑浊的水，可以分别回复6,3,4,0点水。

你可以在https://realdrinkingwatermodminecraft.fandom.com/zh/wiki/%E7%9C%9F%E5%AE%9E%E9%A5%AE%E6%B0%B4%E6%A8%A1%E7%BB%84(%E6%88%91%E7%9A%84%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C)_Wiki获取教程
